description_long: This elderly man has a muscular, bare upper body with defined arms and a visible chest, wearing dark brown pants secured with a black belt and black shoes. His skin is light, and his face is characterized by a long, white mustache and bushy white eyebrows, giving him a wise and distinctive appearance. He has a full head of white hair styled in a high bun with a rounded topknot. The figure's posture is upright, with arms slightly outstretched and relaxed at his sides. His facial expression is neutral, with wide, open eyes that add a sense of alertness. The overall look is that of a fit, elderly individual with traditional and somewhat stylized features.
description: A fit, elderly man with a bare chest, brown pants, black shoes, a long white mustache, and a high white hair bun.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muscular torso, long white mustache, bushy eyebrows, and high white hair bun.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the protruding mustache, and the rounded hair bun.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back muscles, the full shape of the hair bun, and the fit build.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, arm, and the bun's rounded shape.
attribute_clothing_style: Bare upper body, dark brown loose pants with a black belt, and black shoes; no visible patterns or accessories.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms slightly outstretched and relaxed.
attribute_hairstyle: Long white hair styled in a high bun with a rounded topknot.
attribute_facial_features: Long white mustache, bushy white eyebrows, wide open eyes, and a neutral expression.
